description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On November 30, 2024 at 12:44 AM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in San Francisco, California was in a 
collision involving an SUV on Kearny Street at Broadway. 
 
The Waymo AV was traveling northbound on Kearny Street and came to a stop behind an SUV that was stopped within the lane of travel. 
The SUV then began reversing and the Waymo AV also reversed until it came to a stop in front of a passenger vehicle behind it. The SUV 
continued to reverse and the rear of the SUV made contact with the front of the stationary Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the 
Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode. Both vehicles sustained damage. 
Print
Clear Form
